title: Calytrix creswellii
taxonomy: Calytrix creswellii is classified as a species of flowering plant in the myrtle family, Myrtaceae. It is native to Western Australia. This plant is part of the Calytrix genus, which includes about 90 species of flowering plants. Calytrix creswellii is further classified as a shrub that grows up to a certain height. The plant's classification reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history within the Myrtaceae family.
uses: Calytrix creswellii is known for its potential medicinal uses in traditional Aboriginal Australian medicine.
